360	        uses: ./.github/actions/build-fantom-runner
361	        with:
362	          release-type: ${{ needs.set_release_type.outputs.RELEASE_TYPE }}
363	          gradle-cache-encryption-key: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_CACHE_ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
364	
365	  run_fantom_tests:
366	    runs-on: 8-core-ubuntu
367	    needs: [build_fantom_runner]
368	    container:
369	      image: reactnativecommunity/react-native-android:latest
370	      env:
371	        TERM: "dumb"
372	    steps:
373	      - name: Checkout
374	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
375	      - name: Run Fantom Tests
376	        uses: ./.github/actions/run-fantom-tests
377	
378	  build_android:
379	    runs-on: 8-core-ubuntu
380	    needs: [set_release_type, check_code_changes]
381	    if: |
382	      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.any_code_change == 'true' &&
383	      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.should_test_android == 'true'
384	    container:
385	      image: reactnativecommunity/react-native-android:latest
386	      env:
387	        # Set the encoding to resolve a known character encoding issue with decompressing tar.gz files in containers
388	        # via Gradle: https://github.com/gradle/gradle/issues/23391#issuecomment-1878979127
389	        LC_ALL: C.UTF8
390	        TERM: "dumb"
391	        GRADLE_OPTS: "-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false"
392	        ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_SIGNING_PWD: ${{ secrets.ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_SIGNING_PWD }}
393	        ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_SIGNING_KEY: ${{ secrets.ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_SIGNING_KEY }}
394	        REACT_NATIVE_DOWNLOADS_DIR: /opt/react-native-downloads
395	    steps:
396	      - name: Checkout
397	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
398	      - name: Build Android
399	        uses: ./.github/actions/build-android
400	        with:
401	          release-type: ${{ needs.set_release_type.outputs.RELEASE_TYPE }}
402	          gradle-cache-encryption-key: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_CACHE_ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
403	
404	  test_e2e_android_rntester:
405	    runs-on: 4-core-ubuntu
406	    needs: [build_android]
407	    strategy:
408	      fail-fast: false
409	      matrix:
410	        flavor: [debug, release]
411	    steps:
412	      - name: Checkout
413	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
414	      - name: Setup node.js
415	        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node
416	      - name: Install node dependencies
417	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
418	      - name: Download APK
419	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
420	        with:
421	          name: rntester-${{ matrix.flavor }}
422	          path: ./packages/rn-tester/android/app/build/outputs/apk/${{ matrix.flavor }}/
423	      - name: Print folder structure
424	        run: ls -lR ./packages/rn-tester/android/app/build/outputs/apk/${{ matrix.flavor }}/
425	      - name: Run E2E Tests
426	        uses: ./.github/actions/maestro-android
427	        timeout-minutes: 60
428	        with:
429	          app-path: ./packages/rn-tester/android/app/build/outputs/apk/${{ matrix.flavor }}/app-x86-${{ matrix.flavor }}.apk
430	          app-id: com.facebook.react.uiapp
431	          maestro-flow: ./packages/rn-tester/.maestro
432	          flavor: ${{ matrix.flavor }}
433	
434	  build_npm_package:
435	    runs-on: 8-core-ubuntu
436	    needs:
437	      [
438	        set_release_type,
439	        build_android,
440	        prebuild_apple_dependencies,
441	        prebuild_react_native_core,
442	      ]
443	    container:
444	      image: reactnativecommunity/react-native-android:latest
445	      env:
446	        TERM: "dumb"
447	        # Set the encoding to resolve a known character encoding issue with decompressing tar.gz files in containers
448	        # via Gradle: https://github.com/gradle/gradle/issues/23391#issuecomment-1878979127
449	        LC_ALL: C.UTF8
450	        GRADLE_OPTS: "-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false"
451	        REACT_NATIVE_DOWNLOADS_DIR: /opt/react-native-downloads
452	    steps:
453	      - name: Checkout
454	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
455	      - name: Build NPM Package
456	        uses: ./.github/actions/build-npm-package
457	        with:
458	          release-type: ${{ needs.set_release_type.outputs.RELEASE_TYPE }}
459	          gradle-cache-encryption-key: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_CACHE_ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
460	
461	  test_android_helloworld:
462	    runs-on: 4-core-ubuntu
463	    needs: build_npm_package
464	    container:
465	      image: reactnativecommunity/react-native-android:latest
466	    env:
467	      # Set the encoding to resolve a known character encoding issue with decompressing tar.gz files in conatiners
468	      # via Gradle: https://github.com/gradle/gradle/issues/23391#issuecomment-1878979127
469	      LC_ALL: C.UTF8
470	      YARN_ENABLE_IMMUTABLE_INSTALLS: false
471	      TERM: "dumb"
472	      GRADLE_OPTS: "-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false"
473	      TARGET_ARCHITECTURE: "arm64-v8a"
474	      REACT_NATIVE_DOWNLOADS_DIR: /opt/react-native-downloads
475	    continue-on-error: true
476	    strategy:
477	      fail-fast: false
478	      matrix:
479	        flavor: [Debug, Release]
480	    steps:
481	      - name: Checkout
482	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
483	      - name: Setup git safe folders
484	        run: git config --global --add safe.directory '*'
485	      - name: Download npm package artifact
486	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
487	        with:
488	          name: react-native-package
489	          path: build
490	      - name: Download maven-local artifact
491	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
492	        with:
493	          name: maven-local
494	          path: /tmp/maven-local
495	      - name: Setup gradle
496	        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-gradle
497	        with:
498	          cache-encryption-key: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_CACHE_ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
499	      - name: Run yarn install
500	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
501	      - name: Set nightly Hermes versions
502	        shell: bash
503	        run: |
504	          node ./scripts/releases/use-hermes-nightly.js
505	      - name: Run yarn install again, with the correct hermes version
506	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
507	      - name: Prepare the Helloworld application
508	        shell: bash
509	        run: node ./scripts/e2e/init-project-e2e.js --useHelloWorld --pathToLocalReactNative "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/build/$(cat build/react-native-package-version)"
510	      - name: Build the Helloworld application for ${{ matrix.flavor }} with Architecture set to New Architecture.
511	        shell: bash
512	        run: |
513	          cd private/helloworld/android
514	          args=()
515	          if [[ ${{ matrix.flavor }} == "Release" ]]; then
516	            args+=(--prod)
517	          fi
518	          yarn build android "${args[@]}" -P reactNativeArchitectures="$TARGET_ARCHITECTURE" -P react.internal.mavenLocalRepo="/tmp/maven-local"
519	      - name: Upload artifact
520	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
521	        with:
522	          name: helloworld-apk-${{ matrix.flavor }}-NewArch-hermes
523	          path: ./private/helloworld/android/app/build/outputs/apk/
524	          compression-level: 0
525	
526	  test_ios_helloworld_with_ruby_3_2_0:
527	    runs-on: macos-15
528	    needs: [prebuild_apple_dependencies, prebuild_react_native_core]
529	    env:
530	      PROJECT_NAME: iOSTemplateProject
531	      YARN_ENABLE_IMMUTABLE_INSTALLS: false
532	    steps:
533	      - name: Checkout
534	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
535	      - uses: ./.github/actions/test-ios-helloworld
536	        with:
537	          ruby-version: 3.2.0
538	          flavor: Debug
539	
540	  test_ios_helloworld:
541	    runs-on: macos-15
542	    needs: [prebuild_apple_dependencies, prebuild_react_native_core]
543	    strategy:
544	      matrix:
545	        flavor: [Debug, Release]
546	        use_frameworks: [false, true]
547	        exclude:
548	          # This config is tested with Ruby 3.2.0. Let's not double test it.
549	          - flavor: Debug
550	            use_frameworks: StaticLibraries
551	    env:
552	      PROJECT_NAME: iOSTemplateProject
553	      YARN_ENABLE_IMMUTABLE_INSTALLS: false
554	    steps:
555	      - name: Checkout
556	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
557	      - uses: ./.github/actions/test-ios-helloworld
558	        with:
559	          flavor: ${{ matrix.flavor }}
560	          use-frameworks: ${{ matrix.use_frameworks }}
561	
562	  lint:
563	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
564	    if: github.repository == 'facebook/react-native'
565	    steps:
566	      - name: Checkout
567	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
568	      - name: Install dependencies
569	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
570	      - name: Lint file structure
571	        shell: bash
572	        run: ./.github/workflow-scripts/lint_files.sh
573	      - name: Run shellcheck
574	        shell: bash
575	        run: ./.github/workflow-scripts/analyze_scripts.sh
576	      - name: Prettier
577	        shell: bash
578	        run: yarn run format-check
579	      - name: markdownlint
580	        shell: bash
581	        run: yarn run lint-markdown
582	      - name: ESLint
583	        shell: bash
584	        run: ./.github/workflow-scripts/exec_swallow_error.sh yarn lint --format junit -o ./reports/junit/eslint/results.xml
585	      - name: Flow
586	        shell: bash
587	        run: yarn flow-check
588	      - name: TypeScript
589	        shell: bash
590	        run: yarn test-typescript
591	
592	  test_js:
593	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
594	    needs: [check_code_changes, lint]
595	    if: needs.check_code_changes.outputs.any_code_change == 'true'
596	    strategy:
597	      fail-fast: false
598	      matrix:
599	        node-version: ["24", "22", "20.19.4"]
600	    steps:
601	      - name: Checkout
602	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
603	      - name: Test JS
604	        uses: ./.github/actions/test-js
605	        with:
606	          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
607	
608	  build_js_types:
609	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
610	    needs: [check_code_changes, lint]
611	    if: needs.check_code_changes.outputs.any_code_change == 'true'
612	    steps:
613	      - name: Checkout
614	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
615	      - name: Setup Node.js
616	        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node
617	      - name: Install dependencies
618	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
619	      - name: Build react-native package types
620	        shell: bash
621	        run: yarn build-types --skip-snapshot
622	      - name: Validate generated types
623	        shell: bash
624	        run: yarn test-generated-typescript
625	
626	  build_debugger_shell:
627	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
628	    needs: check_code_changes
629	    if: needs.check_code_changes.outputs.debugger_shell == 'true'
630	    steps:
631	      - name: Checkout
632	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
633	      - name: Setup Node.js
634	        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node
635	      - name: Install dependencies
636	        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
637	      - name: Build packages
638	        shell: bash
639	        run: yarn build --prepack
640	      - name: Verify debugger-shell build
641	        shell: bash
642	        run: node scripts/debugger-shell/build-binary.js
643	
644	  # This job should help with the E2E flakyness.
645	  # In case E2E tests fails, it launches a new retry-workflow workflow, passing the current run_id as input.
646	  # The retry-workflow reruns only the failed jobs of the current test-all workflow using
647	  # ```
648	  # gh run rerun ${{ inputs.run_id }} --failed
649	  # ```
650	  # From https://stackoverflow.com/a/78314483 it seems like that adding the extra workflow
651	  # rather then calling directly this command should improve stability of this solution.
652	  # This is exactly the same as rerunning failed tests from the GH UI, but automated.
653	  rerun-failed-jobs:
654	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
655	    needs: [test_e2e_ios_rntester, test_e2e_android_rntester, test_e2e_ios_templateapp, test_e2e_android_templateapp, run_fantom_tests]
656	    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && always() }}
657	    steps:
658	      - name: Checkout
659	        uses: actions/checkout@v6
660	      - name: Rerun failed jobs in the current workflow
661	        env:
662	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
663	        run: |
664	          SHOULD_RETRY=${{fromJSON(github.run_attempt) < 3}}
665	          if [[ $SHOULD_RETRY == "false" ]]; then
666	            exit 0
667	          fi
668	
669	          RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED=${{ needs.test_e2e_android_rntester.result == 'failure' }}
670	          TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED=${{ needs.test_e2e_android_templateapp.result == 'failure' }}
671	          RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED=${{ needs.test_e2e_ios_rntester.result == 'failure' }}
672	          TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED=${{ needs.test_e2e_ios_templateapp.result == 'failure' }}
673	          FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED=${{ needs.run_fantom_tests.result == 'failure' }}
674	
675	          echo "RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED: $RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED"
676	          echo "TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED: $TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED"
677	          echo "RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED: $RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED"
678	          echo "TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED: $TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED"
679	          echo "FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED: $FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED"
680	
681	          if [[ $RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED == "true" || $TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED == "true" || $RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED == "true" || $TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED == "true" || $FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED == "true" ]]; then
682	            echo "Rerunning failed jobs in the current workflow"
683	            gh workflow run retry-workflow.yml -F run_id=${{ github.run_id }}
684	          fi
685

file.content:
name: Test All

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - "*-stable"

jobs:
  set_release_type:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'facebook/react-native'
    outputs:
      RELEASE_TYPE: ${{ steps.set_release_type.outputs.RELEASE_TYPE }}
    env:
      EVENT_NAME: ${{ github.event_name }}
      REF: ${{ github.ref }}
    steps:
      - id: set_release_type
        run: |
          if [[ $EVENT_NAME == "schedule" ]]; then
            echo "Setting release type to nightly"
            echo "RELEASE_TYPE=nightly" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [[ $EVENT_NAME == "push" && $REF == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            echo "Setting release type to release"
            echo "RELEASE_TYPE=release" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "Setting release type to dry-run"
            echo "RELEASE_TYPE=dry-run" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          echo "Should I run E2E tests? ${{ inputs.run-e2e-tests }}"

  check_code_changes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.repository == 'facebook/react-native'
    outputs:
      any_code_change: ${{ steps.filter_exclusions.outputs.any_code_change == 'true' || github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
      should_test_android: ${{ steps.filter_exclusions.outputs.should_test_android == 'true' || github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
      should_test_ios: ${{ steps.filter_exclusions.outputs.should_test_ios == 'true' || github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
      debugger_shell: ${{ steps.filter_inclusions.outputs.debugger_shell }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Check for code changes (exclusion patterns)
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@209e61402dbca8aa44f967535da6666b284025ed
        id: filter_exclusions
        with:
          predicate-quantifier: every
          filters: |
            any_code_change:
              - '**'
              - '!**/__docs__/**'
              - '!**/*.md'
            should_test_android:
              # Not an isolated iOS change
              - '**'
              - '!packages/react-native/React/**'
              - '!packages/react-native/ReactApple/**'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.m'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.mm'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.podspec'
              - '!packages/rn-tester/RNTester/**'
              - '!packages/rn-tester/RNTesterPods*/**'
              - '!packages/rn-tester/Podfile*'
            should_test_ios:
              # Not an isolated Android change
              - '**'
              - '!gradle/**'
              - '!gradle*'
              - '!packages/gradle-plugin/**'
              - '!packages/react-native/ReactAndroid/**'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.java'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.kt'
              - '!packages/react-native/**/*.gradle*'
              - '!packages/react-native-popup-menu-android/**'
              - '!packages/rn-tester/android/**'
      - name: Check for code changes (inclusion patterns)
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@209e61402dbca8aa44f967535da6666b284025ed
        id: filter_inclusions
        with:
          filters: |
            debugger_shell:
              - 'packages/debugger-shell/**'
              - 'scripts/debugger-shell/**'

  prebuild_apple_dependencies:
    needs: check_code_changes
    if: |
      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.any_code_change == 'true' &&
      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.should_test_ios == 'true'
    uses: ./.github/workflows/prebuild-ios-dependencies.yml
    secrets: inherit

  prebuild_react_native_core:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/prebuild-ios-core.yml
    with:
      use-hermes-nightly: ${{ !endsWith(github.ref_name, '-stable') }}
    secrets: inherit
    needs: [prebuild_apple_dependencies]

  test_ios_rntester_ruby_3_2_0:
    runs-on: macos-15
    needs:
      [prebuild_apple_dependencies, prebuild_react_native_core]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Run it
        uses: ./.github/actions/test-ios-rntester
        with:
          ruby-version: "3.2.0"
          flavor: Debug

  test_ios_rntester_dynamic_frameworks:
    runs-on: macos-15-large
    needs: check_code_changes
    if: |
      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.any_code_change == 'true' &&
      needs.check_code_changes.outputs.should_test_ios == 'true'
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        flavor: [Debug, Release]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Run it
        uses: ./.github/actions/test-ios-rntester
        with:
          flavor: ${{ matrix.flavor }}
          use-frameworks: true
          run-unit-tests: false # tests for dynamic frameworks are already run in the test_ios_rntester job; this is to just a test build from source (no prebuilds)

  test_ios_rntester:
    runs-on: macos-15-large
    needs:
      [prebuild_apple_dependencies, prebuild_react_native_core]
    continue-on-error: true
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        flavor: [Debug, Release]
        frameworks: [false, true]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Run it
        uses: ./.github/actions/test-ios-rntester
        with:
          use-frameworks: ${{ matrix.frameworks }}
          flavor: ${{ matrix.flavor }}

  test_e2e_ios_rntester:
    runs-on: macos-15-large
    needs:
      [test_ios_rntester]
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        flavor: [Debug, Release]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node
      - name: Download App
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: RNTesterApp-NewArch-${{ matrix.flavor }}
          path: /tmp/RNTesterBuild/RNTester.app
      - name: Check downloaded folder content
        run: ls -lR /tmp/RNTesterBuild
      - name: Setup xcode
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-xcode
      - name: Run E2E Tests
        uses: ./.github/actions/maestro-ios
        with:
          app-path: "/tmp/RNTesterBuild/RNTester.app"
          app-id: com.meta.RNTester.localDevelopment
          maestro-flow: ./packages/rn-tester/.maestro/
          flavor: ${{ matrix.flavor }}

  test_e2e_ios_templateapp:
    runs-on: macos-15-large
    needs: [build_npm_package, prebuild_apple_dependencies]
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        flavor: [Debug, Release]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Setup xcode
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-xcode
      - name: Setup node.js
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node
      - name: Run yarn
        uses: ./.github/actions/yarn-install
      - name: Setup ruby
        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
        with:
          ruby-version: 2.6.10
      - name: Download React Native Package
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: react-native-package
          path: /tmp/react-native-tmp
      - name: Print /tmp folder
        run: ls -lR /tmp/react-native-tmp
      - name: Download ReactNativeDependencies
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: ReactNativeDependencies${{ matrix.flavor }}.xcframework.tar.gz
          path: /tmp/third-party
      - name: Print third-party folder
        shell: bash
        run: ls -lR /tmp/third-party
      - name: Download React Native Prebuilds
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: ReactCore${{ matrix.flavor }}.xcframework.tar.gz
          path: /tmp/ReactCore
      - name: Print ReactCore folder
        shell: bash
        run: ls -lR /tmp/ReactCore
      - name: Configure git
        shell: bash
        run: |
            git config --global user.email "react-native-bot@meta.com"
            git config --global user.name "React Native Bot"
      - name: Prepare artifacts
        run: |
          REACT_NATIVE_PKG=$(find /tmp/react-native-tmp -type f -name "*.tgz")
          echo "React Native tgs is $REACT_NATIVE_PKG"

          # For stable branches, we want to use the stable branch of the template
          # In all the other cases, we want to use "main"
          BRANCH=${{ github.ref_name }}
          if ! [[ $BRANCH == *-stable* ]]; then
            BRANCH=main
          fi

          node ./scripts/e2e/init-project-e2e.js --projectName RNTestProject --currentBranch $BRANCH --directory /tmp/RNTestProject --pathToLocalReactNative $REACT_NATIVE_PKG

          cd /tmp/RNTestProject/ios
          bundle install
          NEW_ARCH_ENABLED=1

          export RCT_USE_LOCAL_RN_DEP=/tmp/third-party/ReactNativeDependencies${{ matrix.flavor }}.xcframework.tar.gz
          # Disable prebuilds for now, as they are causing issues with E2E tests for 0.82-stable branch
          export RCT_TESTONLY_RNCORE_TARBALL_PATH="/tmp/ReactCore/ReactCore${{ matrix.flavor }}.xcframework.tar.gz"
          RCT_NEW_ARCH_ENABLED=$NEW_ARCH_ENABLED bundle exec pod install

          xcodebuild \
            -scheme "RNTestProject" \
            -workspace RNTestProject.xcworkspace \
            -configuration "${{ matrix.flavor }}" \
            -sdk "iphonesimulator" \
            -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" \
            -derivedDataPath "/tmp/RNTestProject"
      - name: Run E2E Tests
        uses: ./.github/actions/maestro-ios
        with:
          app-path: "/tmp/RNTestProject/Build/Products/${{ matrix.flavor }}-iphonesimulator/RNTestProject.app"
          app-id: org.reactjs.native.example.RNTestProject

    runs-on: 4-core-ubuntu
    needs: build_npm_package
    strategy:

    steps:

        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7

          path: /tmp/react-native-tmp/maven-local
      - name: Download React Native Package
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: react-native-package
          path: /tmp/react-native-tmp
      - name: Print /tmp folder
        run: ls -lR /tmp/react-native-tmp
      - name: Prepare artifacts
        id: prepare-artifacts
        run: |
          REACT_NATIVE_PKG=$(find /tmp/react-native-tmp -type f -name "*.tgz")
          echo "React Native tgs is $REACT_NATIVE_PKG"

          MAVEN_LOCAL=/tmp/react-native-tmp/maven-local
          echo "Maven local path is $MAVEN_LOCAL"

          # For stable branches, we want to use the stable branch of the template
          # In all the other cases, we want to use "main"
          BRANCH=${{ github.ref_name }}
          if ! [[ $BRANCH == *-stable* ]]; then

          TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED=${{ needs.test_e2e_ios_templateapp.result == 'failure' }}
          FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED=${{ needs.run_fantom_tests.result == 'failure' }}

          echo "RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED: $RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED"
          echo "TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED: $TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED"
          echo "RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED: $RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED"
          echo "TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED: $TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED"
          echo "FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED: $FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED"

          if [[ $RNTESTER_ANDROID_FAILED == "true" || $TEMPLATE_ANDROID_FAILED == "true" || $RNTESTER_IOS_FAILED == "true" || $TEMPLATE_IOS_FAILED == "true" || $FANTOM_TESTS_FAILED == "true" ]]; then
            echo "Rerunning failed jobs in the current workflow"
            gh workflow run retry-workflow.yml -F run_id=${{ github.run_id }}
          fi

name: yarn-install
runs:
  using: composite
  steps:
    - name: Install dependencies
      shell: bash
      run: |
        MAX_ATTEMPTS=2
        ATTEMPT=0
        WAIT_TIME=20
        while [ $ATTEMPT -lt $MAX_ATTEMPTS ]; do
            yarn install --non-interactive --frozen-lockfile && break
            echo "yarn install failed. Retrying in $WAIT_TIME seconds..."
            sleep $WAIT_TIME
            ATTEMPT=$((ATTEMPT + 1))
        done
        if [ $ATTEMPT -eq $MAX_ATTEMPTS ]; then
            echo "All attempts to invoke yarn install failed - Aborting the workflow"
            exit 1
        fi

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV NODE_VERSION=22

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_${NODE_VERSION}.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm install -g yarn

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN yarn install --non-interactive --frozen-lockfile

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

set -e

cd /app

echo "Running JavaScript tests..."
node ./scripts/run-ci-javascript-tests.js --maxWorkers 2

if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi
